predicate.title: Token usage as a metric: agent-usage/v1 evidence + dashboard
predicate.problem: Lead and cycle time measure speed but not cost: nothing records what the agent consumed to produce a change. Owner directive: add token usage as a metric.
acceptance_criteria: agent-usage/v1 predicate exists in the spec (0.4.0), optional evidence
A Claude Code adapter measures real usage from the session transcript for the change window
metrics.py surfaces tokens in CLI, JSON, and the dashboard (own chart — different unit, own axis)
This CR carries its own measured usage evidence
out_of_scope: Backfilling older changes (append-only evidence, one CR per PR)
Cost-in-currency conversion (pricing is vendor data, not evidence)
